about.title: Who we are
about.description: Vardhishnu is a non-profit organization working toward protecting and empowering children from vulnerable backgrounds, particularly those involved in or at risk of child labor. We believe every child deserves a safe space to learn, grow, and thrive.

items.name: Anandghar
items.description: Community learning centers for children from vulnerable backgrounds to connect, share and reflect.

items.name: Anandghar Fellowship
items.description: Two year teaching fellowship where fellows are placed in community learning center where they work closely with children, parents, community and the schools.

items.name: Community Collectives
items.description: One year unique support program for grass-root initiaitves with limited or no exposure of changing developmental landscape

impact.title: From safe spaces to thriving futures - our impact in action

metrics.label: Children in partner organisations' project areas

footer.about: Work with local community for better future of their children

Our Advisors.name: Sunil Chavan
Our Advisors.bio: Mr. Sunil Chavan, Fondly Known As Sunil Kaka, Holds An M.Sc. In Statistics And An MBA In Marketing. After Spending 17 Years In The IT Sector, He Founded His Own Company In 1996, Which He Successfully Exited In 2012 To Dedicate Himself To The Social Sector. He Currently Serves As Director At Dr. M. L. Dhawale Trust, Palghar, And Is Also A Director At Bharat Rural Livelihood Foundation (BRLF). In Addition, He Is A Visiting Faculty Member At Shiv Nadar University, Where He Shares His Rich Experience With Young Leaders. Mr. Chavan Has Been Associated With Vardhishnu As A Member Of The Advisory Board Since 2016. A Seasoned Entrepreneur With Deep Expertise In Finance And Economics, He Provides Vardhishnu With Invaluable Strategic Guidance And Financial Counsel, Helping Strengthen The Organization’s Vision And Long-Term Sustainability.

Our Advisors.name: Nikunj Jhaveri
Our Advisors.bio: Mr. Nikunj Jhaveri Founded Systems Plus In 1987, A Company Specializing In IT Services. Alongside Leading Systems Plus, He Also Successfully Served As The Chief Information Officer For PepsiCo Asia Pacific In An Outsourced Capacity, Bringing Global Corporate Experience To His Work. He Serves On The Boards Of Several Non-Profit Organizations, Including PRIDE, VOICE, And The Indian Women's Football Association, Reflecting His Deep Commitment To The Social Sector. Mr. Jhaveri Has Been Associated With Vardhishnu As A Member Of The Advisory Board Since June 2022. He Plays A Key Role In Supporting The Organization’s Growth By Guiding Scale-Up Efforts, Strengthening Fundraising Strategies, And Enabling Meaningful Collaborations.

Our Advisors.name: Shubhada Joshi
Our Advisors.bio: An Architect By Education, Smt. Shubhada Has Dedicated Her Life To Providing Quality Education To Underprivileged Children In Pune. For Over 25 Years, She Has Been Closely Associated With Khelghar, An Initiative Of Palakneeti Pariwar, Where She Has Worked Tirelessly To Create Meaningful Learning Spaces For Children. She Graciously Accepted Vardhishnu's Invitation To Serve On The Advisory Committee, Bringing With Her Deep Expertise And Long-Standing Experience In The Education Sector. Her Insights Play A Vital Role In Helping Us Design Thoughtful Curricula And Create Engaging, Child-Centric Content That Enriches The Learning Journeys Of The Children We Work With.

Our Advisors.name: Isabel Rodrigues
Our Advisors.bio: Isabel Is A Marketing & Communications Executive In The Higher Education Sector, Helping Colleges And Universities Improve Enrollment, Brand Visibility, And Technology Adoption. In The Past Year, She Has Consulted 300+ Universities Across 50 Countries, Driving An Average 10% Increase In ROI. She Is A Board Member Of AND, A Europe-Based Humanitarian NGO Working Across 40+ Countries In Collaboration With The EU, UNDP, And Foreign Affairs Departments. Isabel Holds Qualifications In Business Administration, Economic Diplomacy, And International Relations, And Is Deeply Interested In Global Governance, Entrepreneurship, And Sustainable Development. Currently Based In Oslo, Norway, She Continues To Study And Write On Economic Development And Human Behavior.

Our Founders.name: Adwait Dandwate
Our Founders.bio: Adwait Founded Vardhishnu In 2013 With A Vision That Every Child Deserves Dignity, Opportunity, And A Safe Space To Grow. With Over A Decade Of Experience In The Development Sector, He Brings Deep Insight Into Communities And Sustainable Change. He Holds A Master's In Sociology From The University Of Pune And Completed A Leadership Accelerator Program At IIM Bangalore. As Executive Director, He Leads Strategy, Partnerships, Fundraising, And Organizational Growth, While Representing Vardhishnu On National And Global Platforms. His Leadership Is Shaped By Fellowships From Samajik Kritadnyata Nidhi, Janarth, Wipro Foundation, Acumen India, And The Gratitude Network.

Our Founders.name: Pranali Sisodiya
Our Founders.bio: Pranali Sisodiya Holds An M.Sc. In Anthropology From The University Of Pune And A B.Sc. In Biotechnology From North Maharashtra University. She Brings With Her Rich Grassroots Experience, Having Worked With SEARCH, Gadchiroli, And MKCL Knowledge, Pune. Pranali Rejoined Vardhishnu As A Director In January 2019, Where She Leads The On-Ground Implementation Of The Anandghar Initiative. Her Work Spans Curriculum And Content Development, As Well As Monitoring And Evaluation, Ensuring That Learning Spaces Remain Meaningful, Child-Centric, And Impactful. She Is Currently A Wipro Seeding Program Fellow. Deeply Connected To The Communities She Works With, Pranali Finds Her Greatest Joy In Spending Quality Time With Children And Shaping Learning Environments Where They Can Thrive.

Team Anandghar.name: Khyati Momaya
Team Anandghar.bio: Khyati Holds A Master's Degree In Education From Azim Premji University. She Brings Over Five Years Of Experience From Vidya Integrated Development For Youth & Adults, A Mumbai-Based Non-Profit, Where She Worked As A Program Manager. At Vardhishnu, Khyati Serves As Program Co-Lead, Working Closely With The Fellow-Educators To Support Effective On-Ground Implementation. She Also Plays A Key Role In Designing Systems And Processes That Ensure The Smooth And Efficient Functioning Of The Anandghar Program.

Team Anandghar.name: Abhishek Sananse
Team Anandghar.bio: Abhishek Worked With Vardhishnu As A Volunteer And Fellow-Educator For Almost 3 Years Before Joining Azim Premji University To Pursue M.A In Education. Post His Masters Degree He Has Joined Us Back And Is Currently Taking Care Of Curriculum Building Along With Anandghar Fellowship

Team Community Collectives.name: Vineet Patil
Team Community Collectives.bio: Vineet Is An Engineer By Qualification Who Began His Career In The Corporate Sector Before Transitioning Into The Development Space. Driven By A Deep Commitment To Social Change, He Founded Ninavi Mitra, An Initiative That Created Learning Spaces For So-Called "Failed" Students, Supported Women's Empowerment, And Worked With Youth Affected By Addiction. At Vardhishnu, Vineet Plays A Key Role In Strengthening The Community Collectives Program. Along With Designing Strategies, Workshops, And Coordination Frameworks, He Serves As A Coach And Facilitator For Cohort Members, Supporting Grassroots Leaders As They Build Sustainable, Community-Led Change.

Team Community Collectives.name: Pradeep Gujar
Team Community Collectives.bio: Pradeep Holds A Master's Degree In Science From Pune University. He Transitioned From The Biotechnology Sector To The Development Space Through The Chief Minister Fellowship, Maharashtra, Bringing A Systems-Oriented Approach To Grassroots Work. He Spent Three Years Working In A Core Tribal Region Of Nandurbar District, Supporting Holistic Village Development And Building Strong Partnerships For Sustainable, Community-Led Initiatives. As Program Manager – Community Collectives At Vardhishnu, Pradeep Works Closely With Cohort Members To Strengthen Both Organizational And Programmatic Capacities. He Travels Extensively To Support Partners On The Ground, Ensuring Hands-On Guidance And Effective Implementation.

whychildren.title: Why Children
whychildren.introduction: According to the United Nations Convention on the Rights of the Child (UNCRC), which India ratified in 1992, every child is entitled to fundamental rights that must be respected and upheld by both governments and citizens.

rights.title: Right to Survival
rights.content: which ensures a child’s right to be born, and to access food, shelter, clothing, healthcare, and live a life with dignity;

rights.title: Right to Protection
rights.content: which safeguards children from all forms of violence, neglect, abuse—both physical and sexual—as well as protection from harmful substances like drugs;

rights.title: Right to Participation
rights.content: which recognizes children’s freedom to express their views, access information, form associations, and take part in decisions that affect them directly;

rights.title: Right to Development
rights.content: which guarantees access to education, opportunities to learn, relax, play, and develop emotionally, mentally, and physically.
